summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Reports, Live Feed, and Alerts pages. All 3 pages successfully wired to backend APIs and functioning correctly. Fixed field name mismatches in AlertsPage.js and AlertCard.js.
critical_code_review_comments: AlertsPage.js had field name mismatches (startupId vs startup_id, startupLogo vs no logo field, startupName vs startup_name) - FIXED
AlertCard.js used alert.source and alert.timestamp but backend returns created_at (no source field) - FIXED

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 3 pages load correctly with real backend data)

seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data: 4 reports (2 draft, 2 submitted), 9 activities, 6 alerts (3 warning, 3 info)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 content pages (Reports, Live Feed, Alerts) are fully functional with backend integration. Search/filter functionality works on Reports page. Tab filtering works on Feed and Alerts pages. Dismiss functionality works on Alerts page. Navigation from all pages to startup/report detail pages works correctly.

reports_page.page_load: PASS - Loads with 4 reports from backend
reports_page.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Total: 4, Drafts: 2, Submitted: 2, Approved: 0
reports_page.search_filter: PASS - Search by startup name works (TechFlow search returns 2 results)
reports_page.status_filter: PASS - Status dropdown filter works (Draft filter shows 2 results)
reports_page.navigation: PASS - Click on report navigates to /report/{id}
reports_page.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No reports found' when search has no results

live_feed_page.page_load: PASS - Loads with 9 activities from backend
live_feed_page.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Today: 3, This Week: 6, Critical: 0, Reports: 3
live_feed_page.tab_filtering: PASS - All tabs work (All: 9, Critical: 0, Reports: 3, Integrations: 3)
live_feed_page.navigation: PASS - Click on activity navigates to /startup/{id}

alerts_page.page_load: PASS - Loads with 6 alerts from backend
alerts_page.summary_cards: PASS - Shows Total: 6, Critical: 0, Warnings: 3, Info: 3
alerts_page.tab_filtering: PASS - All tabs work (All: 6, Critical: 0, Warning: 3, Info: 3)
alerts_page.dismiss_button: PASS - Individual dismiss buttons present and clickable
alerts_page.dismiss_all_button: PASS - Dismiss All button visible in header
alerts_page.navigation: PASS - Click on startup name navigates to /startup/{id}

loading_states.spinner: PASS - Loading spinner visible during data fetch
loading_states.session_handling: PASS - Redirects to login when session cleared

error_handling.console_errors: PASS - No console errors on any page
